results.title: The budget was worse for auctions than anybody realised
Sertexity Labs Inc. Files Form D With SEC for $5 Million Private Offering as AI Platform Expands Infrastructure
results.description: MIAMI, May 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Sertexity Labs Inc., the company behind the Sertexity AI platform , has filed a Form D notice with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission for a private securities offering of up to $5 million. The filing marks a formal capital-raising step for the Florida-based company as it continues to build AI infrastructure, automated data systems, and digital-market technology.
